title: helicteres tenuipila
intro: Helicteres tenuipila, also known as the slender helicteres or narrow-leaved helicteres, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Helicteres tenuipila include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake and insect bites. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and made into teas or infusions, and its extracts have also been used in the production of traditional remedies.
